class.name: OScriptNodeAwaitCoroutine
class.brief_description: Yields execution of the orchestration until the specified method finishes.
class.description: The [OScriptNodeAwaitCoroutine] node provides coroutine behavior to an orchestration for function calls. The node accepts two key input values, the [param target] pin specifies the object/owner of the function while the [param function_name] specifies the name of the function to wait for. When this node executes, it registers a callback, and yields execution back to Godot. Only once the function ends the orchestration resumes; otherwise it continues to wait indefinitely.
